---
title: "Birding at Lake Zurich"
subtitle: "Stampf & Nuolen · April 2026"
categories:
  - Birds
  - Nature
  - Lake Zurich
date: "2026-04-11"
image: "images/swan.jpg"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    lightbox: true
---

A spring afternoon along the shores of Lake Zurich - waterbirds at Stampf, lapwings in the fields around Nuolen.

::: {layout-ncol=1}

![*Mute Swan*](images/swan.jpg){group="birds" fig-alt="Mute swan standing on a pebbly lakeshore"}

![*Egyptian Geese*](images/egyptian-goose.jpg){group="birds" fig-alt="A pair of Egyptian geese on a gravel shore"}

![*Black-headed Gulls*](images/black-headed-gull.jpg){group="birds" fig-alt="Black-headed gulls in shallow water, one taking flight"}

![*Northern Lapwing*](images/lapwing-1.jpg){group="birds" fig-alt="Northern lapwing standing in green grass"}

![*Northern Lapwing*](images/lapwing-2.jpg){group="birds" fig-alt="Northern lapwing walking on muddy plowed ground"}
:::
